commit_message: fixes NPE at line 252 (caused by null Digest)
fixes NPE at line 252 (caused by null Digest)
Applied patch by Hans Bjustrom (checking for null up_handler/down_handler to avoid NPE)
Applied patch by Hans Bjustrom (checking for null up_handler/down_handler to avoid NPE)
Fixed SMACK to be able to use TUNNEL as transport -  It waits for CONNECT_OK from below and only after that it sends JOIN_ANOUNCEMENT
Fixed SMACK to be able to use TUNNEL as transport -  It waits for CONNECT_OK from below and only after that it sends JOIN_ANOUNCEMENT

diff:
diff --git a/bin/probe.bat b/bin/probe.bat
new file mode 100644
index 00000000000..665bc77e7ae
--- /dev/null
+++ b/bin/probe.bat
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+@echo off
+
+REM Discovers all UDP-based members running on a certain mcast address (use -help for help)
+REM Probe [-help] [-addr <addr>] [-port <port>] [-ttl <ttl>] [-timeout <timeout>]
+
+
+set CLASSPATH=..\classes
+
+set CP=%CLASSPATH%
+
+
+java -cp %CP% org.jgroups.tests.Probe %*
diff --git a/bin/probe.sh b/bin/probe.sh
new file mode 100644
index 00000000000..239b953073a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/bin/probe.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+# Discovers all UDP-based members running on a certain mcast address (use -help for help)
+# Probe [-help] [-addr <addr>] [-port <port>] [-ttl <ttl>] [-timeout <timeout>]
+
+
+BIN=`dirname $0`
+
+CLASSPATH=$BIN/../classes
+
+# OS specific support (must be 'true' or 'false').
+cygwin=false;
+case "`uname`" in
+    CYGWIN*)
+        cygwin=true
+        ;;
+esac
+
+if [ $cygwin = "true" ]; then
+   CP=`cygpath -wp $CLASSPATH`
+else
+   CP=$CLASSPATH
+fi
+
+
+java -cp $CP org.jgroups.tests.Probe $*

commit_message: fixed bug #938584  added sending down suspend and resume events in case of state transfer
fixed bug #938584  added sending down suspend and resume events in case of state transfer
updated: callRemoteMethods() dont send if dests list is empty
updated: callRemoteMethods() dont send if dests list is empty

MessageDispatcher - upProcessingThread - run() - Broke the event handling and taking the event from the queue to two saparate actions -  I placed a synchronization barrier between the two actions -  This prevents the first message always being lost because correlator is null (race condition) -

MessageDispatcher - upProcessingThread - run() - Broke the event handling and taking the event from the queue to two saparate actions -  I placed a synchronization barrier between the two actions -  This prevents the first message always being lost because correlator is null (race condition) -
Solved null pointer exception in start() when prot_adaptor is null -
Solved null pointer exception in start() when prot_adaptor is null -

Added call to prot_adapter - pause() from MessageDispatcher - stop() -  It got deleted by mistake between the last two CVS versions -  Also added protection from null pointer exception if prot_adaptor is null -

Added call to prot_adapter - pause() from MessageDispatcher - stop() -  It got deleted by mistake between the last two CVS versions -  Also added protection from null pointer exception if prot_adaptor is null -
added patch sent by Amir Shevat amir@coridan - com
added patch sent by Amir Shevat amir@coridan - com
